title: Neomammillaria leucocentra

intro: Neomammillaria leucocentra, also known as the "Silver Pincushion Cactus," is a species of cactus in the family Cactaceae, native to Mexico. The plant has been found to possess various health benefits, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can aid in wound healing and reducing the risk of infections.
